text.title: TTS Implementation — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON shape returned by TTSService.synthesize() for both short-form (single-chunk) and long-form (multi-chunk assembled) outputs. Carries cache_key, chunks array, total duration, eviction flag.

section.title: JSON Schema
section.code: { "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema", "$id": "faion://tts-implementation/output.schema.json", "type": "object", "required": ["status", "path", "duration_s", "provider", "voice", "model", "cache_key", "cached", "chunks"], "properties": { "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["ok", "error"]}, "path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1, "description": "assembled audio file path"}, "duration_s": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "description": "sum of all chunk durations"}, "provider": {"type": "string", "enum": ["openai", "elevenlabs", "google", "azure"]}, "voice": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}, "model": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1}, "speed": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.25, "maximum": 4.0, "default": 1.0}, "cache_key": {"type": "string", "pattern": "^[a-f0-9]{64}$", "description": "sha256 of full text + voice + speed + provider"}, "cached": {"type": "boolean"}, "chunks": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "required": ["index", "path", "duration_s", "char_count", "cached"], "properties": { "index": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0}, "path": {"type": "string"}, "duration_s": {"type": "number"}, "char_count": {"type": "integer"}, "cached": {"type": "boolean"} }}}, "eviction": {"type": "object", "properties": { "files_removed": {"type": "integer"}, "bytes_freed": {"type": "integer"} }}, "consent_id": {"type": "string", "description": "present only when clone path was taken"}, "error": {"type": "string"} }, "additionalProperties": false }

list.item: chunks — empty array for single-call payloads; one entry per chunk for LongTextTTS output.
path — assembled audio file (sum of chunks for long-form, single file for short-form).
duration_s — sum of chunk durations measured with pydub; 0.0 with status ok is an error.
cache_key — sha256 hex of full payload + voice + speed + provider.
consent_id — required when provider == "elevenlabs" AND voice is a cloned voice id.

antipattern.description: provider == "elevenlabs" with cloned voice_id and no consent_id field.
antipattern.reason: Violates rule r6-clone-consent-gate; legal exposure under ElevenLabs ToS.
Long-form output without chunk metadata cannot be re-assembled or partially evicted.

antipattern.description: cache_key length != 64 or contains non-hex characters.
antipattern.reason: Cache lookups via the key will silently miss; integrity check fails.

example.code: { "status": "ok", "path": "out/audio/cache/abc123/episode-42.mp3", "duration_s": 312.7, "provider": "openai", "voice": "onyx", "model": "tts-1-hd", "speed": 1.0, "cache_key": "9f4a7c3e8d2b1a5f6e9c0d3b2a1f4e8d7c9b6a5d4e3c2b1a0f9e8d7c6b5a4f3e", "cached": false, "chunks": [ {"index": 0, "path": "out/audio/cache/abc123/chunk-0.mp3", "duration_s": 62.1, "char_count": 3950, "cached": false}, {"index": 1, "path": "out/audio/cache/abc123/chunk-1.mp3", "duration_s": 64.5, "char_count": 3990, "cached": false}, {"index": 2, "path": "out/audio/cache/abc123/chunk-2.mp3", "duration_s": 63.0, "char_count": 3920, "cached": false}, {"index": 3, "path": "out/audio/cache/abc123/chunk-3.mp3", "duration_s": 61.8, "char_count": 3880, "cached": false}, {"index": 4, "path": "out/audio/cache/abc123/chunk-4.mp3", "duration_s": 61.3, "char_count": 3260, "cached": false} ], "eviction": {"files_removed": 4, "bytes_freed": 18874368} }

example.note: Invalid: cloned voice but no consent_id field; cache_key not sha256; chunks empty for >20s audio.

list.item: If duration_s > 60s, chunks array has >= 2 entries.
sum(c.duration_s for c in chunks) ≈ duration_s (within 0.5s tolerance).
If provider == "elevenlabs" and voice is a clone id, consent_id is present and non-empty.
If eviction object is present, files_removed and bytes_freed are non-negative integers.
